subject: ASAP: Fullstack Engineer
body:
Hi,

I'm writing to share a new consultant request that has just come in.

CLIENT: NordKart
ROLE: Architect Fullstack Engineer
START: ASAP
DURATION: 12 months
LOCATION: Stockholm / hybrid
RATE: To be discussed

The team works primarily with TypeScript, GCP, Kubernetes and MongoDB.

Key requirements:

  • TypeScript
  • GCP
  • Kubernetes
  • MongoDB

Don't hesitate to reach out with any questions.

Best regards,
Emma Andersson
Recruitment Consultant
Nexum Consulting
Tel: +46 76 901 23 45
